message:
feat(fp-frame): integrate MultiIndex with DataFrame set_index/reset_index (frankenpandas-ujl)

Add set_index_multi and to_multi_index methods to DataFrame:

- set_index_multi(columns, drop, sep): creates composite index from
  multiple columns by joining values with separator. Delegates to
  existing set_index for single-column case.
- to_multi_index(columns): extracts a standalone MultiIndex from
  DataFrame columns without modifying the DataFrame. Returns
  fp_index::MultiIndex with level names set to column names.

6 new tests covering multi-column index creation, no-drop mode,
single-column delegation, MultiIndex extraction, and error cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
